raw.objective: “to evaluate, in patients with epilepsy concurrently taking AEDs, (1) the safety and chronic dose tolerance of lamotrigine up to 300 mg/day, (2) the pharmacokinetics of lamotrigine, and (3) whether the N-methylated metabolite of lamotrigine was present in plasma and urine”
raw.covariates: Included: WT on CL and Vd
raw.observations: First compartmental analysis of LMT. Includes WT indirectly by modelling CL and Vd relative to weight. No goodness-of-fit plots
raw.dose: Steady-state and non-steady-state oral doses in patients
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.084 theta2=1.3 theta3=3.1 omega1= 0.082 omega2= 0.053 omega3= 0.65

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady-state and non-steady-state oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to evaluate, in patients with epilepsy concurrently taking AEDs, (1) the safety and chronic dose tolerance of lamotrigine up to 300 mg/day, (2) the pharmacokinetics of lamotrigine, and (3) whether the N-methylated metabolite of lamotrigine was present in plasma and urine”

covariates.raw: Included: WT on CL and Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
